name: Frontend agent prompt (CrisPRO clinician UI)
what_it_solves: System prompt / behavioural spec for the frontend agent that mediates the clinician UI.
how_it_solves: 17KB prompt document defining the agent's persona, tool access, invariants (RUO stamping, no free-text tier claims), and error handling.
why_it_exists: Makes the clinician-facing agent's behaviour a versioned artefact rather than an implicit convention.
